label.title: JCR Statistics
label.description: Compute a JCR subtree and analyze it as an interactive flamegraph, a sortable tree-table or a top-largest list, weighted by size or number of nodes. Save snapshots to a file, reload them, and compare two snapshots to see what changed. The same computation is available as the jcr-stats:compute-size Karaf command and the jcrStats GraphQL API.
label.emptyHint: Enter a JCR path and click Compute to analyze it.
label.baselineLoadedHint: Baseline loaded. Compute or load a current snapshot to compare it.
label.excludeHint: Excluded paths (and their subtrees) are skipped. Recompute to apply.
label.diffNone: No differences between the two snapshots.
label.error: An error occurred. Check server logs for details.
label.errorCompute: The computation failed. Check the path and the server logs, then try again.
label.errorLoad: Could not load the snapshot: the file is not a valid JCR Stats snapshot.
label.errorBaseline: Could not load the baseline: the file is not a valid JCR Stats snapshot.
label.infoTimeout: The computation is taking longer than expected. Stopped watching; the server job may still be running.
label.pathRequired: Enter a JCR path to analyze.
label.clickHint: Click a frame to zoom in; click a parent frame to zoom back out.
label.keyboardHint: The flamegraph is mouse-operated. Use the Tree table view for full keyboard access.
label.baselineFileLabel: Load baseline snapshot file for comparison (JSON)
